# Test Ad 2: Generic DTC/SaaS Ad

**Source:** Crafted to represent typical mediocre SaaS ad copy
**Expected quality band:** Mediocre generic (~45-60)
**Tests:** Discrimination — does severity triage add signal vs. just low scores?

---

## Ad Copy

Stop wasting time on manual processes.

TaskFlow Pro is the all-in-one project management platform that helps teams get more done in less time. Our powerful AI-driven features streamline your workflow so you can focus on what matters most.

Here's what TaskFlow Pro offers:

✅ Smart task automation
✅ Real-time collaboration tools
✅ Advanced analytics dashboard
✅ Seamless integrations with 200+ apps
✅ Enterprise-grade security

Thousands of teams trust TaskFlow Pro to manage their projects more efficiently. Whether you're a startup or an enterprise, our flexible platform scales with your needs.

"TaskFlow Pro changed the way we work." — Sarah T., Operations Manager

"We saved 15 hours per week after switching to TaskFlow Pro." — Mike R., CTO

Don't let outdated tools hold your team back. Join the future of project management today.

Start your free 14-day trial now. No credit card required.

Plans start at just $12/user/month.
